_comment: Architecture rules for the STS solution. JSON (not YAML) on purpose: CI runs on a bare setup-python with no pip, so no PyYAML. Patterns are case-sensitive fnmatch globs matched against a node's namespace, fully-qualified name, assembly, or short name.

layers.message: UI layer reaches the data/SQL layer directly (route through a service/repository)
domain/core layer depends on the WPF/presentation framework

coupling._comment: Martin's package metrics (Ca/Ce/Instability) per namespace. abstractness/distance light up automatically once graph nodes carry an is_abstract flag.
